response.original_title: Guidance Counselor Helps Perfect Student Discover her True Nature
response.overview: Blake has always knows she is special. She’s definitely smarter, prettier and more motivated than any of the other girls in school, and they all know it. Seeing an under achieving loser that ended up as a finishing school guidance counselor is a total waste of her time since she knows exactly what she plans to do after graduation. But, it’s school policy so she will humor him.
response.title: Guidance Counselor Helps Perfect Student Discover her True Nature
